title: Bee Craft | Create
description: A Create modpack for the beecraft server
body:
Bee Craft | Create – A fully immersive, automation-focused survival experience for Minecraft 1.21.1

The Create Survival Modpack is a carefully curated modpack centered entirely around the brilliant and mechanical gameplay offered by the Create mod. It’s designed to provide players with a fresh, rewarding survival experience where creativity and engineering go hand in hand.

Rather than overwhelming you with dozens of unrelated mods, this pack focuses on enhancing and expanding the vanilla experience in a meaningful, focused way—bringing out the full potential of Create in a survival setting.

🛠️ Core Features:
Designed for Minecraft 1.21.1, with stable and tested mod integration

Fully built around the Create mod and its add-ons (if applicable)

Survival-friendly gameplay: explore, mine, build, automate, and survive

Adds quality-of-life improvements that enhance usability without breaking immersion

Carefully selected companion mods to complement Create's mechanics (e.g., performance enhancers, decoration mods, minor tech extensions)

Ideal for solo play or small multiplayer servers

🔧 Gameplay Focus:
This modpack gives players the tools and freedom to automate nearly every aspect of survival—from mining and farming to item sorting and transport. Create’s kinetic mechanics, rotational power, and modular systems open up endless possibilities for creative engineering.

Whether you're building elaborate factories, steampunk trains, or clever contraptions, this modpack offers the structure and stability to support it—all while preserving the classic survival challenge.

🎮 Who Should Play This?
If you're a fan of hands-on technical builds, automation, and problem-solving in Minecraft, this is the modpack for you. No magic, no complicated tech trees, no clutter—just a polished survival experience with room to dream big and build even bigger.

🌐 Multiplayer Support
The modpack runs smoothly on private servers and is especially enjoyable with friends, as you collaborate to build shared infrastructure, automate resource production, or challenge each other to create the most efficient machines.
